name: Exceedingly Discreet
notes: One of only a handful of Dandelions properly called a Llellewyoly on Regina. Exceedingly Discreet delights in playing games, has only a limited conception of human legal systems and finance, and uses its position at Winter Shipping to keep embarrassing or illegal information off the computer system. Its alien brain also contains records on criminal activity and Ven Yasha's activities.
playingNotes: Hold yourself upright. Extend your arm towards whoever you are speak to.
Address everyone by their full title at all times. Invent titles if they do not have formal ones. ("Yes, Overly Talkative Navigator...")
Try to find logical contradictions and holes in whatever the Travellers say. Nit-pick mercilessly.
Never raise your voice or speak in anything other than a gentle, lyrical tone.
